title: The Extra Reward for Owning Stocks Over Bonds Has Disappeared
content: There is little sign of crimped demand for equities among individual investors, who remain bullish after two years of blockbuster gains.
content_preview: There is little sign of crimped demand for equities among individual investors, who remain bullish after two years of blockbuster gains.
text: The Extra Reward for Owning Stocks Over Bonds Has Disappeared. There is little sign of crimped demand for equities among individual investors, who remain bullish after two years of blockbuster gains.
